# viettelidc_ovpc_network_interface (Resource)

ViettelIDC Network Interface (NIC).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "viettelidc_ovpc_network_interface" "nic" {
  name           = "my-nic"
  subnet_id      = viettelidc_ovpc_subnet.private.id
  ip_assign_type = "auto"
  vpc_id         = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip_assign_type` (String) STATIC or auto. Immutable.
- `name` (String)
- `subnet_id` (String) Subnet to attach the NIC to. Mutable (NIC may move subnets).

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `ip_address` (String) IP address. Required when ip_assign_type=STATIC; assigned by the system when auto.
- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NIC ID assigned by the system (vttNetworkInterfaceId).
- `status` (String)
